reason_selected: Long session continuation uses recent turn window with high stale tolerance. Stale cache is acceptable for this workload.

alternatives_rejected.reason: Recomputation is 300x more expensive; stale cache is acceptable for long continuation

receipt_summary.label: RAM cache selected for long session continuation
receipt_summary.detail: Stale cache accepted with warning. Long continuation workload tolerates degraded freshness.
